entry.title: Soundtrack up, dialogue on low
entry.summary:
Author: theloudestlion

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,241Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 136

Summary: Eddie is so opposed to talking about his feelings that when he wakes up with amnesia, he refuses to clarify if the only person whose name he remembers is his husband, boyfriend, or even just a coworker.

entry.title: If I try and love again, would I lose or win?
entry.summary:
Author: mistelae

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,804Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 9

Summary: After Eddie and Chris move back to LA from El Paso, they move into the house on South Bedford with Buck. Cue a slow burn full of silly bullshit, shenanigans, fluff, angst, jealousy, and eventual smut because Eddie is emotionally constipated and Buck is an avoidant sweetheart. This is set 6 months after the end of Season 8 and before any of the events of Season 9.

entry.title: Twenty-Five Days 'Til Home
entry.summary:
Author: jette_writer

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 90,096Chapters: 26/26Kudos: 3

Summary: When Christopher asks to do "25 Days 'Til Christmas" this year, Buck says yes before he even knows what that means. Soon, there's a calendar on the fridge, glitter in the grout, hot cocoa permanently on the stove, and Eddie Diaz quietly realizing that somehow, somewhere between paper snowflakes and late-night movie marathons, Evan Buckley became his favorite holiday tradition. Twenty-five days. One house. A kid with a plan. Two idiots in love. By Christmas morning, something has to give.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: ain't no fun for the wicked
entry.summary:
Author: nineinchdove

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,030Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 60

Summary: “WHAT THE FUCK!?” the woman is shouting, shooting up onto her feet and grabbing her head.  Even the man being eaten by the bed jerks back in alarm when wetness splatters on his face, causing him to shiver.  “Buck!” Ravi shouts.  “DID HE JUST PISS EVERYWHERE!?” the woman screams. “WHY THE HELL DID HE JUST PISS EVERYWHERE!?”DAY THREE: Cryptic Pregnancy

entry.title: Time in a bottle
entry.summary:
Author: DaniWib

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,074Chapters: 7/7Kudos: 155

Summary: After the failed intervention at Athena's house, Buck fled, his disbelief quickly swallowed by a rising tide of fury. Hen’s rant about no one caring echoed in his ears, each word piercing deep until his vision burned red. No one cared? No one? He had cared! He had tried to hold everyone together, checking in, reaching out, desperately trying to stop the 118 from falling apart. But they made it clear Buck's efforts weren’t wanted, weren’t needed, or in Hen’s case, didn’t even count. Just when Buck’s hurt and anger finally overflowed, he encountered someone with the power to change it all. A crossroads demon. [Fic is complete, chapters posted weekly Friday & Tuesday nights AEST]

entry.title: I Will Cross Universes for You
entry.summary:
Author: NyotaGirl

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 25,005Chapters: 6/10Kudos: 29

Summary: "He wasn't me. How..." Buck's voice cracks, and the sound cuts through Eddie like a knife. "...how could you not see that?" And the tears finally fall, and all Eddie wants is to wrap him in his arms and hold him until they melt into one, until he can ease some of Buck's pain. Pain that he caused. He can only hang how head in shame, ignoring the way his own heart breaks because he should have known better. He should have... OR Buck has an evil doppelganger OR In which Buck's evil 'twin' kidnaps Buck and takes his place and Eddie and the rest of the 118 are none the wiser. In their defense, how could they have known that alternate universes existed?

entry.title: Moonstruck
entry.summary:
Author: Buddiecanon7

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 843Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 1

Summary: Buck smiled, his eyes crinkling at the corners. Eddie smiled at him back. It was easy times like this that made Buck wonder whether or not his sister was onto something. Times where he swore nothing was meant to be kept quiet, that they should both just say everything they felt no matter how rough to hear. He didn't know what to do. It's a rare thing, Buck being so lost that he can't do anything. He'd never admit it, but the feeling was undeniable. or, Buck spirals over his confusing feelings for Eddie because of Maddie's constant insisting.

entry.title: The Family We Chose
entry.summary:
Author: Pnk_strawberry1

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 68,601Chapters: 16/18Kudos: 353

Summary: Evan Buckley was truly fucked. One week after leaving the only home he’d ever known—his parents’ house—Ground Zero hit, and the world went to hell. Eight months later, he’s still searching for his sister Maddie in Los Angeles, armed only with a tear-stained note: “I’m leaving Doug. I’m going to Los Angeles.” When Buck finally tracks her to Safe Zone 118, he realizes that maybe having a family—and surviving alongside people who actually care—isn’t so bad. At 118, firefighter Eddie Diaz, a single dad, turned his fire station into a refuge with his team when Ground Zero struck. Just trying to keep his kids safe, he’s thrown for a loop when a stranger shows up claiming to be Maddie’s brother. Buck is skilled, prepared, and oddly magnetic—forcing Eddie to question everything he thought he knew about survival, trust, and maybe even… something more.

entry.title: But, You’re My Idiot
entry.summary:
Author: Writeninembers

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 25,104Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 57

Summary: It starts at the firefighter auction. With Buck on stage.With a smile Eddie can’t return.With a feeling he doesn’t understand—and refuses to name. Because it shouldn’t matter. It’s just Buck. Right? It would be easier if it was. Some lines don’t blur.Some lines were never even there. And some feelings? They don’t stay buried. No matter how hard they try.

entry.title: The Hurt Locker
entry.summary:
Author: Piecesofwords

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,567Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 6

Summary: Eddie!? — was his first thought. Buck’s eyelids felt heavy, his lips dry. His face pressed against the freezing floor, and for a long moment, he didn’t move. Just breathe. Let his body remember what to do. His right arm was pinned beneath his torso, numb, his left awkwardly twisted behind him. He inhaled. No wind. No scent of sun-warmed asphalt, no trace of salty ocean air. The air was recycled, lukewarm, slightly damp. He was indoors. He shifted his limbs, adjusting slightly. Nothing restrained him, nothing tied him down — not at the wrists, not at the ankles. Good news. Probably. The most important thing was to stay calm, scan the room, find a way out. [...] ------------------- Or Maddie have enough with this buddie nonsense, so after a family night she decide to act on it. Meanwhile Buck woke up with an heavy head and no memory how he come here.

entry.title: only fools rush in (and we're both goddamn morons)
entry.summary:
Author: cavsers

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,217Chapters: 1/3Kudos: 47

Summary: Eddie wanted to tell other people. He wanted to share this part of himself that he'd kept hidden and locked away with his friends. He also wanted to get on his knees, cling to his best friend's legs, and refuse to let go while he confessed his undying love to him. Rushing into things, it turns out, wasn't a symptom of being a repressed and closeted homosexual. It was just a symptom of being Eddie Diaz. - Eddie moves past the "Will you be my boyfriend?" and skips straight to forever.

entry.title: Broken Into Fractions
entry.summary:
Author: kikibridges13

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,017Chapters: 2/3Kudos: 64

Summary: “I’m still your best friend, Eds,” he says. “I’m fine.” Eddie steps closer, lowering his voice so it doesn’t carry beyond them. “No,” he says, brown eyes meeting blue. “You’re not.” There’s a long beat that stretches between them. The airport continues to hum around them, but it feels distant, like it’s happening all around them and leaving their own bubble out of the chaos. Eddie watches as Buck’s eyes flicker between the three of them, the three truths that he couldn’t ignore. All standing firm, refusing to let him walk away. His chest rises and falls with a slow, controlled breath. Buck stares at Eddie, really looking at him for the first time in Eddie didn’t even know how long. Eyes full of hurt, betrayal, but underneath all of it, fear. “…I hate you,” Buck says roughly. Eddie nods once, accepting it without hesitation. “Yeah,” he says quietly. “I know.” Post Nashville Crossover Eddie has noticed the way Buck is slowly pulling away from everybody. With the help of Maddie and Athena, he decides to take his best friend to the one person who can help him, even it's beyond the grave.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: the mom problem
entry.summary:
Author: diazkissed

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,645Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 80

Summary: “Mom?” Simon asked, blinking innocently. Chimney turned his head back to Simon. “Uh, no. Maddie is Jee-Yun’s mom. We’re talking about your dad, who shouldn’t be called Buck. Right?” He pointed to Buck in the photo once more, ready to try again — even though, realistically, he didn’t need to. Simon smiled large, mimicking Chimney’s pointing. “Mom!” Chimney’s faced dropped with the heavy realization of what he accidentally just did. Shit. “Simon, that’s not your mom, that’s—” “No, that’s mama!” Simon leaned forward, wanting to get closer to the photo as he challenged the words Chimney uttered. Chimney made a face and disagreed by shaking his head, then pulled them away from the cabinet immediately, instantly regretting getting his nose into business that wasn’t his. He didn’t know why he bothered, really. Chimney set Simon down, ushering him to go in the kitchen and dining room area. He put one hand on his hip and the other over his mouth, unsure what to make of what just happened. Buck would kill him. Probably.OR: How Chimney mistakingly solved Buck's problem, yet somehow made it worse.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

  • Maddie Buckley/Howie "Chimney" Han

entry.title: called you up, in the middle of the night
entry.summary:
Author: az4ria

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,760Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 17

Summary: “It’s not my house, Eddie. It’s your– well, whatever. It’s not the sameee.” Buck is slurring his words – he honestly doesn’t sound too good. “Ever since you left, everything feels sooo different. And at first, I thought I would get used to it y’know? But… I just can’t.” Suddenly, Buck sounds very sober when he says, “I feel like you took a piece of me when you left, and I don’t know how to get it back.” And oh, Eddie thinks. That was– Oh.That doesn't make any sense. Well it does, actually. Eddie kinda gets it too. ---------------------------------------------------------------Or: Buck gets drunk, calls Eddie, and accidentally says something he probably shouldn't have.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)
